resources.string: Session expired, please sign in again
Tap to switch, long press to remove
Legacy local-favorites archive — local favorites only
Or open this URL to transfer
No Wi-Fi IP available; cannot start LAN server
On the same Wi-Fi, scan the QR or open the URL, pick an image, then tap upload.
Coin failed. Try switching to App in Settings → Interface.
Scan with phone to type reply
Login expired, please sign in again
Pick which data scopes to back up to a file
Restore from a previously exported file
Send / receive backup between devices on the same Wi-Fi
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
Press any button or move the stick. Press BACK / B / Select to close.
Tap to restore previous refresh (up to two times)
App personalized recommend needs TV-scan sign-in; switched to Web personalized.
Normal hold: down keeps climbing; up +1 only on release
Press and hold the UP or DOWN key for at least 2 seconds, then release. The counts show top-left.
Detected: re-press remote. Compatibility mode is on — long-press works (short-press delay tuned to %1$d ms for this remote).
Detected: standard remote. Instant mode (no short-press delay).
Held too briefly — hold a direction key for at least 2 seconds, then release.
Only effective when transcoded qualities (e.g. Ultra HD) are listed; may cause stutter on some devices
Only the default stream is available
Switch failed, staying in current room
Cannot write to %1$s — %2$s. Try the app folder under Android/data/, or use LAN transfer.
No file picker on this device — please use LAN transfer instead
Open this URL on your phone to download/upload JSON
No LAN IP available — use file import/export instead
Scan with phone to open this video
Scan with phone to open at %1$s
Bilibili app not found. Scan the code with another device.
Local network unavailable. Connect TV to the same Wi-Fi as your phone.
Field format invalid (check full Cookie or SESSDATA / bili_jct / DedeUserID)
DedeUserID does not match the cookie
Open in browser or app to confirm
QR code expired. Refresh to try again.
Scan the QR code with the Bilibili app
Scanned. Confirm sign-in on your phone.
Note: features that require an access token (video / UP-profile IP location, etc.) are unavailable in this mode.
Memory saver enabled based on device memory
This quality is already cached. Play it from the Local Cache tab.
Only preview playback is available for this account
Cached stream changed. Please delete this item and cache it again.
Interactive videos cannot be cached yet
Sign in to use AI dub
Current source does not support AI dub
AI dub not supported for this video
AI dub unavailable; switched to original
Decoder is struggling; try Auto or another decoder in settings
Playback issues; lowered to %1$s. Try again later or change decoder in settings.
Initial quality failed, trying other combinations…
%1$s did not resolve a direct link
Bilibili silently filters emoji — remove them and try again
Scan with phone to type danmaku
Playback error: all codecs and qualities failed
360° video — use the viewpoint button on the controls bar to look around
Screenshot needs TextureView render mode. Switch in Settings → Playback → Render view.
Storage permission denied — screenshot not saved.
Press back again to exit playback
Auto-parse preview content for full playback
Pin a fixed upos node (e.g. upos-xxx.bilivideo.cn) for video/PGC playback. Bypasses unstable mirror routing and broken-cert edges. Live streams are not affected.
Block danmaku by keywords and regular expressions
Resolve PGC playurl via parser servers when region-restricted
Entering %1$s in %2$ds — press BACK to cancel skip
Auto-skip ads, sponsorships, intros/outros using BilibiliSponsorBlock
Hide videos/articles by title or recommendation-tag keywords and regex
No liked videos, or your likes are not public
No app to open this link
Too frequent. Please try again later.
Prefer GitHub direct; use proxy if slow
Development build that may fix issues in the latest release
Not on Wi-Fi; cannot generate QR code
Only com.chinasoul.bt with matching signature will install
Scan, or open the URL on phone/computer, to send the link
Only com.chinasoul.bt packages with matching signature will be installed. Rollback installs are supported, but not below v0.9.19.
Login required to sync the cloud block list
Sync the danmaku block list you configured on Bilibili. See the Danmaku Block plugin for details.
Hide when identical content appears 3+ times within 5 seconds
Filter low-quality, duplicate, and spam danmaku by strength
Track height = text size x multiplier; lower packs tracks tighter
Turn off Volume normalization first (Playback → Decode → Volume normalization) to enable audio direct-out.
Hand AAC/FLAC to the DSP. Needs Android 10+ and device support; falls back automatically.
Battery % left of clock in touch mode
"Just between you and me — don't spread it."
Last row to screen bottom distance
Min buffer = half of max. Higher = smoother 4K, more memory
Hide the clock inside the player (video/live); restore on exit
Render GIF emotes; off shows static image only
Auto-refresh interval for UP avatar red dots and live badges when re-entering the following page.
Ignore stick values below this magnitude
Master switch for stick + button mapping
No LAN IP detected — download unavailable
Scan to view all logs and pick one to download (same network)
Clear read state, re-show on return
Auto-hide when scrolling stops if off
Optional experimental playback path that bypasses SurfaceFlinger composition. May cause brief audio noise at start on some chipsets. Restart playback after toggling.
Tap %1$d more times to enable developer options
Show button at bottom-right to restore previous refresh
Show fade mask at edges when scrolling
Switch tabs only after pressing OK; for low-memory devices
Tip: long-press a tab on the page to drag it directly
Tip: long-press a sidebar item to reorder it directly
Web/HTTP: default; App/gRPC: fallback to try when web endpoints fail
Reset all settings? This cannot be undone.
App uninstall clears cached videos in the default storage location.
Decode Hi-Res FLAC in software; fixes playback on devices whose hardware FLAC decoder fails at 96/192 kHz
Danmaku density curve above the progress bar
Switch to TextureView if portrait videos misbehave; may stutter
Only when \"Show detail before play\" is enabled
Bangumi only: auto-skip official intro/outro markers
Max wait per endpoint before trying next
Use *.bilivideo.com instead of mcdn high-port edges
PlayViewReq.business enum. 0 = Unknown is REQUIRED — 1 (UGC) triggers a server-side VIP gate that 4xx-rejects every URL at the CDN edge.
Codec hint sent to server. HEVC is REQUIRED for most non-VIP high-qn unlocks — B 站 gates AVC high-qn streams harder at the CDN edge. Auto sends AVC and frequently 4xx-fails.
Log probe results to logcat (tag: BilibiliGrpcApi)
Dev only — dump every dash_video/audio proto field on each call. Use when B 站 changes the proto.
Default 4048 = DASH + 4K + HDR + DV + 8K + AV1 + HiRes + DolbyAudio
BLhd · channel blocked · try another network
"BLhd · server didn't serve the qn · try another BV"
BLhd · 4K ready · between you and me
BLhd · m4s probe failed · slow start expected

"OFF (default): BT automatically deprioritises home-broadband reverse-proxy nodes (PCDN / mcdn), which are commonly unstable. Turn ON only if you've confirmed PCDN is faster on your specific network."
OFF: only the primary URL uses the pinned host; the original is kept as fallback (recommended). ON: all URLs use the pinned host; no fallback if the node is missing the segment.

"Force playback through one specific Bilibili node, bypassing the automatic CDN selection.
【When】 • Frequent stalls, disconnects, or startup failures: try it. • Occasional hiccups: leave it off.
【Find a node】 Method A: on a desktop, log in to Bilibili and open https://www.bilibili.com/blackboard/video-diagnostics.html . Pick a node with high speed and low loss. Note the full domain.
Method B: in BT, play any working video. Open the playback log, find “cdn primary=xxx” — that's the current node.
Overseas users: prefer hosts ending in akamaized.net (e.g. upos-sz-mirrorakam.akamaized.net).
【Set it】 Turn on the plugin master switch → tap “Pinned host” → enter the full domain (e.g. upos-sz-mirrorks3.bilivideo.com). No https://, no slash, no path.
【Test】 Play a video. Works = good. Doesn't work = turn off the switch, try another node.
【Still not working】 Send the playback log (including the “cdn” lines) to the developers."
A bare host (upos-xxx.bilivideo.cn) or full URL. Leave blank to disable.
"When off, fetched rules stay cached but won't affect filtering"
Toggle this in Settings → Danmaku → Cloud danmaku block.
Cloud refresh failed (login required or network error)
Delete danmaku analysis JSONL files from cache
Record minimum blocked level for each danmaku for tuning
"Open this URL from a PC/phone browser: %1$s"
Open the preview page from a PC/phone on the same LAN
Show on-screen vs dropped danmaku (track saturation)
No servers configured. Add a parser server URL you trust below.
⚠ When forwarding is on, your login token is sent to the configured parser server

Bypass HK/MO/TW/SEA/overseas region locks for bangumi by routing playurl requests through a parser server you configure. Only add servers you trust — when access_key forwarding is on, your login token is sent to them.
Max wait per endpoint before trying next
Invalid URL — must start with http:// or https://
Segment data from the bsbsb.top community
Color sponsor segments on the seekbar and mini progress (full-video marks excluded)
Hide dynamic articles whose title contains these words
Hide dynamic articles whose title matches these patterns
Hide home feed videos whose title contains these words
Hide home feed videos whose title matches these patterns
Hide home feed videos whose recommendation tag contains these words (App recommend source only; best-effort, one tag per card so it may miss)
Hide home feed videos whose recommendation tag matches these patterns (App recommend source only)
Can also configure outside the TV
Press OK to select; use D-pad up/down to reorder
Press ▲/▼ to move, OK or back to exit

This app is provided only for learning and research. Any commercial use or other purpose is prohibited. Please uninstall it within 24 hours after installation. Continue only if you have read and accepted this notice.
Press ◀/▶ to move, OK or back to exit
Full screen is used when the selected region has no custom action.
Please use the phone app to charge
This dynamic cannot be opened here yet
Please open this dynamic in the phone app
Type a keyword and tap Search
Detailed metrics off or no samples yet
Long-press to confirm clearing all usage data
This page can be disabled in Playback settings
